prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第52名，近年排名持续上升（2021年65→2022 年59→2023年60→2024年55→2025年51→2026年52），稳居中上水平211，对考生有较强吸引力；2023年声誉评价偏负面（学校管理事件），但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档记录；食品科学与工程A+、轻工技术与工程A+，两个A+学科在 全国处于顶尖水平，对应食品科学与工程、酿酒工程、轻化工程等招生专业，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专 业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校计算机、物联网、自动化、人工智能等招生专业高度相关，推高相关专业报考热度；四川2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万 ）增加约15.5%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；江南大学 位于江苏无锡，在四川招生计划占比较小（约2–3%），地域偏好对报考影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 17842 → 16198 → 19193 → 18260, fluctuating within the 16000–19200 range. In the past three years, it showed a "down-up-down" oscillation pattern, with a baseline of about 18260 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Sichuan was 81 in 2022, 90 in 2023, 91 in 2024, 87 in 2025, and 95 in 2026, an increase of about 9.2% compared to 2025. This significant expansion theoretically eases competition and shifts the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 52nd, with a steady upward trend in recent years (65th in 2021 → 59th in 2022 → 60th in 2023 → 55th in 2024 → 51st in 2025 → 52nd in 2026). It is a stable mid-to-upper level 211 university, strongly attractive to candidates. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a school management incident), but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no clear signs of increased application interest. There are no records of admission gaps. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are top-tier nationally, corresponding to majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Brewing Engineering, and Light Chemical Engineering, which strongly attract candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular in society, closely related to the university's majors like Computer Science, Internet of Things, Automation, and Artificial Intelligence, boosting application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Sichuan general college entrance examination is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000), leading to intensified competition. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, with a relatively small enrollment plan in Sichuan (about 2–3%), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 18260, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.2%, the significant increase in Sichuan candidate numbers by about 15.5% (intensified competition shifts ranking forward), the steady rise in university level, and outstanding advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 19067, with a range of 18567–19567.

Although Food Science and Engineering (A+ discipline) is listed in Tier 2, its strong disciplinary strength deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 4076 → 3517 → 3445 → 3924, fluctuating within the 3400–4100 range. After a higher ranking in 2022, it moved forward for two consecutive years, then rebounded to 3924 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's liberal arts (history category) was 18 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 21 in 2024, 22 in 2025, and 25 in 2026, an increase of about 13.6% compared to 2025. This relatively large expansion theoretically eases competition and shifts the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 52nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years, which also has a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a school management incident), but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with no abnormal surge in application interest. There are no records of admission gaps. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are its dominant disciplines in science and engineering, but as a comprehensive university, its liberal arts majors (e.g., Chinese Language and Literature, Law, English) benefit from the overall platform and have a certain appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, with a small enrollment plan in Sichuan's liberal arts (about 20+ students), so the impact of regional preference on applications is limited. Law has a positive social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and teacher training/education is viewed with caution. The overall popularity of popular liberal arts majors is relatively positive. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Sichuan is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025. Estimating the history category proportion at about 38.5%, the number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 2025 (about 178,000), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3924, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.6%, the substantial increase of about 15.7% in Sichuan's history category candidate pool (which shifts the ranking forward due to intensified competition), and the relatively positive popularity of liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 4165, with a range of 3665–4665.
